honest_status: Not a Claude Code hook — invoked by a Windows Scheduled Task (`NL-session-resumer`, 10-minute cadence) via git-bash, outside settings.json entirely; see adapters/claude-code/scripts/session-resumer.sh header for the exact schtasks /Create line. Registration is an orchestrator/operator step (specs-e §E.W.6), not yet performed as of this fragment's authoring — doctor predicate below reports honest 'documented, not registered' until then. BINDING activation precondition (operator concern 2026-07-06): the task must be registered in SHADOW MODE (RESUMER_SHADOW=1) first and observed >=2 days before arming — see docs/runbooks/session-resumer.md. Five activation guardrails ship with this builder: storm cap (RESUMER_STORM_CAP, default 2/hour), tombstones (--never <id>), a liveness guard (B.12 interactive-session-lock pattern), shadow mode, and the kill-switch runbook.
